name: Beldia
description:
A dullahan and one of the Devil King's generals. He becomes hostile towards [Kazuma](https://anilist.co/character/89364)'s party after [Megumin](https://anilist.co/character/89361) keeps using his castle for explosion practice.
~!He is weak against water and is defeated by [Aqua](https://anilist.co/character/89362)'s purifying magic.!~
